══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goliath — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Goliath — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Goliath — Winged Striker HP: 51/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 32 damage. Goliath — Winged Striker HP: 19/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
